# Amplify Outreach

Amplify Outreach is a Meta ads agency for home service business owners.

## Core Offer

- $750 per month Meta ads management
- Month-to-month service
- All-encompassing management fee
- As many campaigns as the business can responsibly run
- Ad spend is separate from the management fee

## Positioning

Amplify Outreach builds Facebook and Instagram advertising services that bring quality leads and real revenue. Success is not measured by clicks alone. The main scorecard is qualified leads, booked estimates, closed work, and revenue from campaign opportunities.

## Primary CTA

The primary conversion action is a free lead-flow audit. The audit should identify the first campaign angle, lead-quality filters, break-even math, scorecard notes, and campaign tracking gaps.

## Industries

- Landscaping and hardscaping
- Lawn care
- Hardscaping
- Exterior cleaning
- Pressure washing
- Roof washing and soft washing
- Commercial exterior cleaning
- Junk removal
- Estate cleanouts

## FAQ Summary

The $750/month fee covers Meta campaign strategy, setup, testing, tracking, optimization, and reporting. Ad spend is separate and should stay in the owner's ad account. The service is month to month. Campaign count depends on service lines, budget, seasonality, capacity, and the quality of the tracking path.

## Launch Notes

Final phone number, email address, domain, legal address, and form backend still need to be connected before publishing.
